sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45210" key="eu)sumbi/wtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐσυμ-βίωτος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n45210.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easy to live with</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:42:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">42.19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
